summary: Comprehensive testing of Actor's Companion 'My Lines' tab feature and regression testing of existing memorization tabs. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Frontend: Memorization mode opens with 'My Lines' as default tab (data-testid='memorization-mylines-tab')
Frontend: All 4 tabs visible: My Lines, Line Run, Reader, Cue & Recall
Frontend: My Lines shows the actor's line in large centered text (data-testid='my-line-text')
Frontend: My Lines has 'show cue' button (data-testid='show-cue-button') that reveals cue text
Frontend: My Lines shows progress (e.g. '1/3') with amber progress bar
Frontend: Tapping the main area advances to next line (1/3 -> 2/3 -> 3/3)
Frontend: Tapping on last line wraps back to first line (3/3 -> 1/3)
Frontend: Hint text changes from 'tap anywhere for next line' to 'tap to restart' on last line
Frontend: Line Run tab still works with Nailed/Peeked flow
Frontend: Reader tab still works with chunk navigation
Frontend: Cue & Recall tab still works with tap-to-reveal
Frontend: Guided upload flow works end-to-end (step 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> analyze -> breakdown)
Frontend: From breakdown, clicking memorization button opens the overlay
Backend: GET /api/ returns 200 - API health check
Backend: POST /api/analyze/text with mode=quick returns valid breakdown with memorization data
Backend: GET /api/breakdowns returns list of breakdowns
Backend: GET /api/breakdowns/{id} returns breakdown with memorization.cue_recall array
Backend: Memorization cue_recall has correct format (cue/your_line pairs)
Backend: Memorization chunked_lines has correct format for Reader tab
Backend: GET /api/tts/status returns availability status
seed_data_creation: Created new breakdown via guided upload flow with multi-line script for testing tap-to-advance
context_for_next_testing_agent: My Lines tab fully tested. Key data-testids: memorization-mylines-tab, memorization-linerun-tab, memorization-reader-tab, memorization-cue-tab, my-line-text, show-cue-button, my-line-cue-text, memorization-overlay, memorization-close-button, memorization-button. Tap-to-advance works by clicking on the parent div with class 'flex-1 flex flex-col justify-center select-none'. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_mylines_memorization.py can be reused for regression testing.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No bugs found. All My Lines tab features working correctly including tap-to-advance, show cue button, progress indicator, and wrap-around behavior.
